segments.text: And the child Samuel ministered unto the LORD before Eli. And the word of the LORD was precious in those days; there was no open vision.
And it came to pass at that time, when Eli was laid down in his place, and his eyes began to wax dim, that he could not see;
And ere the lamp of God went out in the temple of the LORD, where the ark of God was, and Samuel was laid down to sleep;
Samuel
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Here am I
segments.speaker: Samuel

segments.text: And he ran unto Eli,
Here am I; for thou calledst me
segments.speaker: Samuel

segments.text: I called not; lie down again
segments.speaker: Eli

segments.text: And he went and lay down.
Samuel
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And Samuel arose and went to Eli,
Here am I; for thou didst call me
segments.speaker: Samuel

segments.text: I called not, my son; lie down again
segments.speaker: Eli

footnotes: Now…: or, Thus did Samuel before he knew the LORD, and before the word of the LORD was revealed unto him

segments.text: Now Samuel did not yet know the LORD, neither was the word of the LORD yet revealed unto him.

footnotes: Now…: or, Thus did Samuel before he knew the LORD, and before the word of the LORD was revealed unto him

segments.text: Samuel
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And he arose and went to Eli,
Here am I; for thou didst call me
segments.speaker: Samuel

segments.text: And Eli perceived that the LORD had called the child.
Go, lie down: and it shall be, if he call thee, that thou shalt say, Speak, LORD; for thy servant heareth
segments.speaker: Eli

segments.text: So Samuel went and lay down in his place.
Samuel, Samuel
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Speak; for thy servant heareth
segments.speaker: Samuel

segments.text: Behold, I will do a thing in Israel, at which both the ears of every one that heareth it shall tingle
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: In that day I will perform against Eli all things which I have spoken concerning his house: when I begin, I will also make an end
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For I have told him that I will judge his house for ever for the iniquity which he knoweth; because his sons made themselves vile, and he restrained them not
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: For I…: or, And I will tell him
restrained…: Heb. frowned not upon them

segments.text: And therefore I have sworn unto the house of Eli, that the iniquity of Eli's house shall not be purged with sacrifice nor offering for ever
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And Samuel lay until the morning, and opened the doors of the house of the LORD. And Samuel feared to shew Eli the vision.
Samuel, my son
segments.speaker: Eli

segments.text: Here am I
segments.speaker: Samuel

segments.text: What is the thing that the Lord hath said unto thee? I pray thee hide it not from me: God do so to thee, and more also, if thou hide any thing from me of all the things that he said unto thee
segments.speaker: Eli

segments.text: And Samuel told him every whit, and hid nothing from him.
It is the LORD: let him do what seemeth him good
segments.speaker: Eli

footnotes: every…: Heb. all the things, or, words

segments.text: And Samuel grew, and the LORD was with him, and did let none of his words fall to the ground.
And all Israel from Dan even to Beer-sheba knew that Samuel was established to be a prophet of the LORD.
And the LORD appeared again in Shiloh: for the LORD revealed himself to Samuel in Shiloh by the word of the LORD.
